_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Public-source review. Derived losslessly from the dossier data; nothing added.

risks.title: Marketing titles are not statutory offices
risks.note: Website markets four C-level leaders; the register confirms two as jednatelé. The marketed CTO appears nowhere in the complete preserved register history (primary-verified negative search).

risks.title: Filed revenue declining and far below the media-reported combined target
risks.basis: CLM-44, CLM-45 (filed FY2024 statement, exact rows cited)
risks.note: Replaces the earlier 'statements not retrieved' gap-risk, which was stale: statements were retrieved and parsed. The substantive reading: revenue fell ~14.8% YoY, thin shrinking margin, shareholder loans tripled (FIN-ASSESS-01..04).

risks.title: Performance claims are self-reported
risks.note: Marketing/performance claims await independent corroboration; the Registr smluv returned zero public contracts to anchor the tender claims (CLM-57).

risks.title: Insolvency not conclusively screened
risks.basis: CLM-58 (ISIR BLOCKED — HTTP 500 on both attempts)
risks.note: No public insolvency was found anywhere, but the authoritative register could not be queried. BLOCKED, not clear; absence is not proof of absence.

risks.title: Public court-file discrepancy
risks.note: Company GDPR page cites C 85424; register records C 85425. Most plausibly a transcription/stale-copy error; recorded, not smoothed over.

risks.title: Control concentration outside the founders
risks.note: ZenX Capital, a.s. has held 45.8–50% since Oct 2020 — more than both founders combined — while its own beneficial ownership is not register-visible. The public narrative reviewed does not reflect this.

disclaimer: Risks are ASSESSED readings of documented evidence gaps, not findings of fact. Severity is independent of evidence confidence.
